input_data.question: Analyze how lunar interference affects observations by showing the current moon phase, average Lunar Interference Factor (LIF) and the count of high lunar interference events for each observatory, sorted by average LIF in descending order.

output_data.final_sql:
WITH current_moon_phase AS (
    SELECT phase_name 
    FROM alien.lunar_cycles 
    WHERE cycle_date <= CURRENT_DATE 
    ORDER BY cycle_date DESC 
    LIMIT 1
),
observatory_lunar_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        obsv.id,
        obsv.name AS observatory_name,
        AVG(obs.lunar_interference_factor) AS avg_lif,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE obs.lunar_interference_factor >= 0.8) AS high_interference_events
    FROM alien.observatories obsv
    JOIN alien.observations obs ON obsv.id = obs.observatory_id
    GROUP BY obsv.id, obsv.name
)
SELECT 
    s.observatory_name,
    c.phase_name AS current_moon_phase,
    ROUND(s.avg_lif::numeric, 4) AS average_lunar_interference_factor,
    s.high_interference_events
FROM observatory_lunar_stats s
CROSS JOIN current_moon_phase c
ORDER BY s.avg_lif DESC;
